articles.author: Megan Messerly
articles.title: The G7 wants to prove it can work together. Iran, Ukraine and even Ebola may stand in the way. - Politico
articles.description: The muted ambitions from the United States and European countries reflect how the world has come to operate in the Trump era, in which avoiding a blowup and papering over differences with a message of cohesion is viewed as a win.
articles.content: Part of every goal of G7 is to come out showing that these countries can work together, the official said. They may not always agree on everything, but at least everyone knows where everyone stands, … [+7078 chars]
